summary: Registers the projects navigation and toolbar surfaces in the app shell.
auth: route-level visibility applies inside the shell
notes: Use when wiring Projects into the shared shell.

summary: Lists projects with reusable filters, pagination, and derived task and milestone stats.
auth: signed-in user with project access required in the caller context
notes: Use when building app-owned portfolio tables, boards, and project queries.

summary: Returns reusable portfolio-level project counters for the current project schema.
auth: signed-in user with project access required in the caller context
notes: Use when building app-owned dashboards and portfolio summaries.

summary: Starter page helper that assembles the current projects portfolio payload.
notes: Replace or compose this helper when a project needs a different portfolio page shape.

summary: Detects missing-table and missing-column errors for the current starter schema fallback.
notes: Treat as internal fallback logic for the current starter helpers.
